summary: Security audit for multi-tenant SaaS platform. All 24 backend security tests passed (100%). Verified: platform admin login, automate-accounts code blocking across all auth endpoints, platform admin unrestricted access, unauthenticated access blocking, and valid partner login flow.

minor.issue: CreatePartnerAdminRequest model requires tenant_id in the request BODY even though tenant_id is already present as a PATH parameter. This redundancy could confuse API consumers but has no security impact.

critical_code_review_comments: Security guards are correctly ordered: automate-accounts blocking fires BEFORE tenant lookup in partner_login and customer_login
For /api/auth/register, Pydantic body validation (422) runs before the partner_code guard — BUT this is acceptable: invalid requests fail before reaching business logic
CreatePartnerAdminRequest has redundant tenant_id in body alongside path parameter — consider removing from model for cleaner API design
get_tenant_filter() correctly returns empty dict {} for platform_admin (no tenant filter = sees all data)
require_platform_admin dependency is correctly applied to all /api/admin/tenants/* routes
passed_tests: Test 1: Platform admin login via /api/auth/login returns 200 with token (no partner_code needed)
Test 1b: Platform admin login returns role=platform_admin
Test 5b: POST /api/admin/tenants with code='AUTOMATE-ACCOUNTS' also returns 400
Test 7: Platform admin GET /api/admin/tenants returns full list (200)
Test 10b: Platform admin sees >=1 tenant in list (cross-tenant unrestricted)
Test 12: POST /api/auth/partner-login with nonexistent code returns 400
Test 13: GET /api/me returns role=platform_admin for platform admin
Test 13b: GET /api/me returns tenant_id=None for platform admin
Test 14: Valid partner login with non-reserved code works correctly (200 with token)
seed_data_creation: Created test tenant 'TEST Security Audit Partner' with code='test-security-partner' and partner admin user 'test-partner-admin@security-test.local' during Test 14
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security audit passed 100%. Key facts: (1) /me endpoint is at /api/me (NOT /api/auth/me) and returns nested {user: {...}, customer: ..., address: ...}. (2) CreatePartnerAdminRequest requires tenant_id in BOTH path AND body. (3) automate-accounts blocking is case-insensitive. (4) Platform admin has tenant_id=None and role=platform_admin. (5) Test partner 'test-security-partner' was created in DB.
